script.title: YATCH - Get Workflow Documents
script.description: Get the list of documents defined in an adobe sign workflow
script.code:
<?php 
/*********************************
* YATCH - Get Workflow Documents
*
* by Cinthia Romero
* modified by Helen Callisaya
*********************************/
/**
 * Call Curl
 * 
 * @param string $endpointUrl
 * @param string $method
 * @param array $postFields
 * @param string $bearer
 * @param string $contentType
 * @return array $reponseCurl
 *
 * by Cinthia Romero
 */ 
function callCurl($endpointUrl, $method, $postFields, $bearer, $contentType)
{
    $curl = curl_init();
    curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
        CURLOPT_URL => $endpointUrl,
        CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
        CURLOPT_ENCODING => "",
        CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
        CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 30,
        CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
        CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => $method,
        CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => $postFields,
        CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
            "Authorization: Bearer " . $bearer,
            "Content-Type: " . $contentType,
            "cache-control: no-cache"
        ),
    ));
    $reponseCurl = curl_exec($curl);
    $errorCurl = curl_error($curl);
    $reponseCurl = json_decode($reponseCurl, true);
    curl_close($curl);
    return $reponseCurl;
}

/**
 * Get Base Uri
 * 
 * @param string $adobeSignToken
 * @return array $baseUriResponse
 * 
 * by Cinthia Romero
 */
function getBaseUri($adobeSignToken)
{
    $url = 'https://api.na3.adobesign.com/api/rest/v6/baseUris';
    $curlResponse = callCurl($url, 'GET', array(), $adobeSignToken, 'application/json');
    if (!empty($curlResponse["apiAccessPoint"])) {
        $baseUriResponse = array(
            "success" => true,
            "errorMessage" => "",
            "baseUri" => $curlResponse["apiAccessPoint"]
        );
    } else {
        $baseUriResponse = array(
            "success" => false,
            "errorMessage" => $curlResponse["message"],
            "baseUri" => ""
        );
    }
    return $baseUriResponse;
}

/**
 * Get Workflow Definition
 * 
 * @param string $adobeBaseUri
 * @param string $adobeSignToken
 * @param int $workflowUid
 * @return array $curlResponse
 * 
 * by Cinthia Romero
 */
function getWorkflowDefinition($adobeBaseUri, $adobeSignToken, $workflowUid) {
    $url = $adobeBaseUri . 'api/rest/v6/workflows/' . $workflowUid;
    $curlResponse = callCurl($url, 'GET', array(), $adobeSignToken, 'application/json');
    return $curlResponse;
}

/**
 * Search the array for keywords 
 *
 * @param (string) $string
 * @param (array) $aFilter
 * @return (string) $search
 *
 * by Helen Callisaya
 */
function searchFilter($string, $aFilter)
{
    $search = 0;
    for ($i = 0; $i < count($aFilter); $i++) {
        if (strpos(strtoupper($string), strtoupper($aFilter[$i])) !== false) {
            $search = 1;
        }
    }
    return $search;
}

//Server Token
$serverHost = getenv('API_HOST');
$serverToken = getenv('API_TOKEN');

//Obtain Adobe Token from Collection
$adobeCollectionPMQL = 'data.ASI_PROCESS = "' . $data['_request']['process_id'] . '" and data.ASI_CURRENT_USER = "' . $data['_request']['user_id']. '"';
$adobeSignTokenUrl = $serverHost . '/collections/' . getenv('FORTE_ADOBE_SIGN_INTEGRATOR_KEYS_COLLECTION') . '/records' . '?include=data&pmql=(' . $adobeCollectionPMQL . ')';
$adobeSignTokenResponse = callCurl($adobeSignTokenUrl, 'GET', array(), $serverToken, 'application/json');
$agreementCreationResponse = "";
$workflowDocuments = array();
if (count($adobeSignTokenResponse['data']) > 0) {
    $adobeSignToken = $adobeSignTokenResponse['data'][0]['data']['ASI_ADOBE_INTEGRATOR_KEY'];

    //Check Base Uri
    $baseUriResponse = getBaseUri($adobeSignToken);
    if ($baseUriResponse["success"]) {
        $adobeBaseUri = $baseUriResponse["baseUri"];
        $workflowUid = $data["YQP_ADOBE_WORKFLOW_SELECTED"];

        //Get Workflows List
        $workflowCharacteristics = getWorkflowDefinition($adobeBaseUri, $adobeSignToken, $workflowUid);
        if (!empty($workflowCharacteristics["fileInfos"])) {
            foreach ($workflowCharacteristics["fileInfos"] as $adobefile) {
                $workflowDocuments[] = array(
                    "LABEL" => $adobefile["label"],
                    "REQUIRED" => $adobefile["required"]
                );
            }
        }
    }
}
//Get keyword records
$urlTypeCollection = getenv('API_HOST') . '/collections/' . getenv('FORTE_TYPE_COLLECTION') . '/records';
$responseTypeCollection = callCurl($urlTypeCollection, 'GET', array(), getenv('API_TOKEN'), 'application/json');
$filterWord = array();
foreach ($responseTypeCollection['data'] as $typeDocument) {
    $filterWord[] = $typeDocument['data']['YQP_TYPE_DOCUMENT'];
}
//Set array of required and options
$aDocumentsRequired = array();
$aDocumentsOptions = array();

foreach ($workflowDocuments as $listDocument) {
    //Look for keywords in the name
    if (searchFilter($listDocument['LABEL'], $filterWord) != 1) {
        $aDocumentsOptions[] = $listDocument;
        //Validate if required
        if ($listDocument['REQUIRED'] == true) {
            $aDocumentsRequired[] = $listDocument;
        }
    }
}
//Assign value to array to return
$dataListDocument['YQP_ADOBE_DOCUMENTS_REQUIRED'] = $aDocumentsRequired;
$dataListDocument['YQP_ADOBE_DOCUMENTS_OPTIONS'] = $aDocumentsOptions;

return $dataListDocument;
